What We Do

Our Services

Comprehensive security and surveillance solutions tailored for businesses, residences, and institutions across Morocco.

01
CCTV Installation
Full HD & 4K surveillance systems. IP cameras, analog, and hybrid setups with remote monitoring and cloud storage.
Hikvision · Dahua · UNV
02
Alarm Systems
Intelligent intrusion detection, motion sensors, sirens and SMS/call alerts. Zoned alarm panels for homes and businesses.
Teletek · DSC · Paradox
03
Network & IT
Enterprise-grade LAN/WAN, switch config, Wi-Fi deployment and network security for offices and buildings.
Cisco · MikroTik · TP-Link
04
Cabling & Fiber
Structured cabling, fiber optic deployment, cable trays and conduits. Cat5e, Cat6, Cat6A and fiber backbone installations.
Nexans · Legrand · Belden
05
Maintenance
Scheduled preventive maintenance, emergency repairs and system upgrades. Annual contracts with priority response SLA.
24/7 Support
🛡️
Need a Custom Solution?
Every project is unique. We design bespoke security systems tailored to your specific requirements and budget.
